title: Implement ARIA snapshot tests for key UI components
description:
## GH: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/118

Write ARIA snapshot tests for core components (job list, campaign view, results table, upload form). Use Vitest's native ARIA snapshot. Regex patterns for dynamic content.

**Depends on:** Vitest browser mode + scrubber utility.
**Deliverable:** ARIA snapshot tests for 5+ key components.
